-- This script was generated by the ERD tool in pgAdmin 4.
-- Please log an issue at https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4/issues/new/choose if you find any bugs, including reproduction steps.
BEGIN;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.allposttags
(
    postid integer NOT NULL,
    tagid integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT allposttags_pkey PRIMARY KEY (postid, tagid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.badges
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    userid integer NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    date timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
    jsonfield jsonb,
    CONSTRAINT badges_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.closeasofftopicreasontypes
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    isuniversal boolean NOT NULL,
    markdownmini text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    creationdate timestamp without time zone,
    creationmoderatorid integer,
    approvaldate timestamp without time zone,
    approvalmoderatorid integer,
    deactivationdate timestamp without time zone,
    deactivationmoderatorid integer,
    CONSTRAINT closeasofftopicreasontypes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.closereasontypes
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    description text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT closereasontypes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.comments
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    postid integer NOT NULL,
    score integer NOT NULL,
    text text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    creationdate timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
    userid integer,
    jsonfield jsonb,
    CONSTRAINT comments_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.flagtypes
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    description text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT flagtypes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.posthistory
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    posthistorytypeid integer,
    postid integer,
    revisionguid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    creationdate timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
    userid integer,
    posttext text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    jsonfield jsonb,
    CONSTRAINT posthistory_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.posthistorytypes
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT posthistorytypes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.postlinks
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    creationdate timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
    postid integer NOT NULL,
    relatedpostid integer NOT NULL,
    linktypeid integer NOT NULL,
    jsonfield jsonb,
    CONSTRAINT postlinks_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.postlinktypes
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT postlinktypes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.posts
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    posttypeid integer NOT NULL,
    acceptedanswerid integer,
    parentid integer,
    creationdate timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
    score integer,
    viewcount integer,
    body text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    owneruserid integer,
    lasteditoruserid integer,
    lasteditordisplayname text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    lasteditdate timestamp without time zone,
    lastactivitydate timestamp without time zone,
    title text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    tags text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    answercount integer,
    commentcount integer,
    favoritecount integer,
    closeddate timestamp without time zone,
    communityowneddate timestamp without time zone,
    jsonfield jsonb,
    CONSTRAINT posts_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.posttags
(
    postid integer NOT NULL,
    tagid integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT posttags_pkey PRIMARY KEY (postid, tagid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.posttypes
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT posttypes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.questionanswer
(
    questionid integer NOT NULL,
    answerid integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT questionanswer_pkey PRIMARY KEY (questionid, answerid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.reviewtaskresulttype
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    description text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT reviewtaskresulttype_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.reviewtasktypes
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    description text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT reviewtasktypes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tags
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    tagname text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    count integer,
    excerptpostid integer,
    wikipostid integer,
    jsonfield jsonb,
    CONSTRAINT tags_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.users
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    reputation integer NOT NULL,
    creationdate timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
    displayname character varying(40) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    lastaccessdate timestamp without time zone,
    websiteurl text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    location text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    aboutme text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    views integer NOT NULL,
    upvotes integer NOT NULL,
    downvotes integer NOT NULL,
    profileimageurl text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    age integer,
    accountid integer,
    jsonfield jsonb,
    CONSTRAINT users_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.usertagqa
(
    userid integer NOT NULL,
    tagid integer NOT NULL,
    questions integer,
    answers integer,
    CONSTRAINT usertagqa_pkey PRIMARY KEY (userid, tagid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.votes
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    postid integer,
    votetypeid integer NOT NULL,
    userid integer,
    creationdate timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
    bountyamount integer,
    jsonfield jsonb,
    CONSTRAINT votes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.votetypes
(
    id integer NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT votetypes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
END;
